raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"country","confidence":0.98,"matched_text":"the maldives has been successful in accessing international funding sources, such as the green climate fund (gcf), which is a key multilateral fund that helps developing countries deal with climate change.","distilled_fact":"The Maldives has been successful in accessing international funding sources, such as the Green Climate Fund (GCF)."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"fund","confidence":0.97,"matched_text":"the gcf has approved several projects and programs in the maldives, including initiatives for renewable energy, climate-resilient agriculture, and coastal protection.","distilled_fact":"The Green Climate Fund (GCF) has approved several projects and programs in the Maldives, including initiatives for renewable energy, climate-resilient agriculture, and coastal protection."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"country","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"additionally, the maldives has established partnerships with private sector companies and international organizations for climate change mitigation and adaptation measures.","distilled_fact":"The Maldives has established partnerships with private sector companies and international organizations for climate change mitigation and adaptation measures."}]}
